summary: Software Development Engineer with 5+ years of experience building and evolving microservices and web applications using TypeScript, JavaScript, and Node.js/NestJS. Consistent practitioner of Test-Driven Development (TDD) — writing failing tests before implementation to drive design and ensure correctness. Experienced in Spec-Driven Development (SDD) approaches, collaborating with product and QA teams on well-defined acceptance criteria, testable specifications, and behavior-driven requirements. Hands-on with cloud-native architecture, AWS deployments, and CI/CD pipelines. Active adopter of AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate delivery while maintaining full ownership of design decisions, code quality, and long-term maintainability. Thrive in Agile, cross-functional teams where reliability, scalability, and correctness are first-class concerns.

bullets: Deepened understanding of Test-Driven Development (TDD) and Spec-Driven Development (SDD) principles through focused study and hands-on practice.
Studied cloud-native distributed systems, AWS service patterns, observability, and resilience engineering.
Practiced Python scripting and explored its application in backend automation and data processing.
Applied AI-assisted and agentic development workflows to improve productivity, code quality, and engineering processes.
Worked on personal and experimental projects to strengthen real-world system design and problem-solving skills.
Designed and implemented new modules and features in a NestJS-based microservices architecture, with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
Applied Test-Driven Development (TDD) as a core engineering discipline, writing unit and integration tests before implementation to validate behavior and drive design decisions.
Collaborated with product owners and QA on well-defined specifications, acceptance criteria, and testable requirements, aligning with Spec-Driven Development (SDD) practices.
Applied enterprise architecture principles and design patterns across the full development lifecycle, from discovery and backlog refinement to deployment and monitoring.
Built reusable and accessible UI components using CVA and Radix UI, maintaining strong design system consistency.
Developed responsive screens in Next.js (Web) and React Native (Mobile) based on product prototypes and UX specifications.
Maintained and improved a TypeScript-based codebase, ensuring code quality, readability, and scalability.
Implemented end-to-end tests using Cypress alongside Jest and React Testing Library, guaranteeing reliability and preventing regressions.
Developed and maintained RESTful APIs in Node.js, documenting endpoints with Swagger to enforce clear contract definitions and cross-team alignment — a key pillar of specification-driven delivery.
Practiced Test-Driven Development (TDD) using Jest and React Testing Library, writing tests ahead of implementation to improve reliability and reduce regression risk.
Maintained and evolved front-end applications built with React, Redux, TypeScript, and Styled-Components.
Integrated third-party and internal APIs with advanced request management strategies, including request cancellation to prevent race conditions.
Designed and delivered real-time chat features using Socket.IO, enabling low-latency bidirectional communication.
Deployed and maintained React applications using AWS S3 static hosting, contributing to CI/CD release processes and cloud-native delivery.
Implemented unit tests with Jest and React Testing Library following a test-first approach, improving confidence in production deployments.
Built scalable, accessible interfaces using React, Next.js, Gatsby, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
Integrated front-end applications with internal and third-party APIs, ensuring robust data flow and error handling.
Enhanced the company's Design System by implementing Storybook Controls, improving component discoverability and cross-squad adoption.
Mentored new engineers, disseminating best practices in code quality, testing, and front-end architecture.
Redesigned mobile application screens based on product style guides and high-fidelity prototypes, applying UX, usability, and accessibility best practices.
Integrated front-end applications with APIs and managed cart and order state flows using React Native and Redux.
Contributed to the successful MVP launch of a digital ordering mobile application, collaborating cross-functionally to ensure timely delivery and production readiness.
Worked in parallel on the next-generation app version using Flutter and Dart, implementing the Repository Pattern to improve testability and separation of concerns.
Collaborated with the Product team to gather and refine requirements for new digital solutions, translating business needs into technical specifications.
Modeled and implemented digital products using JavaScript (ES6+), React, and Node.js, ensuring clean architecture and maintainable code.
Integrated third-party APIs to collect and process data from client marketing campaigns, enabling data-driven insights.
Contributed to the early-stage development of an agency SaaS product, enabling clients to manage and track leads via a dashboard platform.
Collaborated with the Product team to gather and refine requirements for new features, translating business needs into technical solutions.
Designed and implemented user-friendly interfaces with a strong focus on UX, usability, and accessibility principles.

Modeled and developed a new event scheduling module within a monolithic MVC architecture using Laravel (PHP), JavaScript (ES5/jQuery), and CSS3, ensuring maintainable structure and clear separation of concerns.
